cells.data:
* Display error on hover
* Require fields error in form
* When loading data into the form, show progress indiciator?
* Save admin form URL (auto) & Main Content URL (via setting). Auto save on published page. Save to `_links.json`?
* redirect after save
* Always save updated time to objects? Created time?
* Centralize the unsaved class addition. Watch for custom event and change events on input.
* generateData() should really be based on the fieldsets not the individual inputs
* ID stack needs an autogen field check to make sure that its properly mapped.
* Open product page in new tab after save. Cool idea.

### Form Fields

* Move admin form fieldsets to use web components

* Gallery 
* Radio
* Ratings/Scores
* File
* Depot
* Menu Builder
* Replace Awesomeplete https://joshuajohnson.co.uk/Choices/

* Select Field Ideas

  * Bring in a lit of objects to asociate with by ID?
